Name: G&G Arcade - Arcade Assistant Bridge
Brief: HTTP bridge for Arcade Assistant integration with LaunchBox.
Description: Provides an HTTP API bridge on port 9999 that allows the Arcade Assistant system to communicate with LaunchBox. Enables game launching, search, and platform queries from external applications. Includes a Tools menu item for testing the bridge connection.
Credits: Built with ChatGPT, Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Sinntra), Codex, and Kiro
